keyPointsSummary: Short adjectives (1 syllable): add -er/-est (tall -> taller -> tallest)
Long adjectives (2+ syllables): use more/most (beautiful -> more beautiful -> most beautiful)
Irregular forms: good -> better -> best, bad -> worse -> worst
Comparative compares two things; superlative compares three or more

quickQuiz.hindi: यह फिल्म उस फिल्म से बेहतर है।
quickQuiz.answer: This movie is better than that movie.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह किताब उससे ज्यादा दिलचस्प है।
quickQuiz.answer: This book is more interesting than that one.
This is the most interesting book.

quickQuiz.hindi: आज का मौसम कल से खराब है।
quickQuiz.answer: Today's weather is worse than yesterday's.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह इस साल का सबसे खराब मौसम है।
quickQuiz.answer: This is the worst weather this year.

mustRememberRules: Short adjectives (1 syllable): add -er/-est (tall -> taller -> tallest)
Long adjectives (2+ syllables): use more/most (beautiful -> more beautiful -> most beautiful)
Irregular forms: good -> better -> best, bad -> worse -> worst
Comparative compares two things; superlative compares three or more
